{{Infobox character
| name = Prince Seishen Kiro
| aliases = Prince Kiro, Seishen Kiro, Kiro
| parents = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dakata]]}}
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Riyusai Meira|Meira]], [[Seishen Daji|Daji]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|combat techniques, [[Striker technique]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Prince, first prince, [[Underlord]], star Underlord}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, original crown prince}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Kingdom]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Prince Seishen Kiro Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Prince [[Seishen]] Kiro was the first prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and the son of [[King Dakata]]. A trained and disciplined leader, he was known for his ability to maintain composure and politeness even during moments of extreme anxiety or high-stakes social interactions. In combat, he utilized a [[sword]] and a heavy metal shield decorated with a lion's face, which he could reinforce with [[madra]] and [[soulfire]] to create protective domes. His equipment included high-quality [[Soulsmith]] armor that featured layers of dark gray [[madra]] with flashes of silver and yellow. Kiro's life was marked by significant conflict, including a confrontation with [[Lindon]] that resulted in severe injuries from a [[Blackflame cannon]]. Despite his efforts to seek healing through life-aspect treasures, he suffered from recurring nightmares related to the battle. He eventually died, an event that left his younger brother, Daji, resentful and caused instability within the [[Seishen Kingdom]]. Following Kiro's death, his legacy was tied to the struggles of his family and the subsequent actions of his brother.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Prince [[Seishen]] Kiro is the first prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and the son of [[King Dakata]]. While searching for the [[Blackflame]] boy alongside Meira, he utilized combat techniques involving a [[sword]] with blue sparks and a red-hot metal shield bearing a lion's face. As an [[Underlord]] whose [[Path]] incorporates aspects of earth and force, Kiro wore armor made entirely of [[madra]] that glowed with a silver-and-yellow corona. During his confrontation with [[Lindon]], the noble-blooded warrior launched a bright blue lance and used a [[Striker technique]] to produce blue lightning from his blade. Despite being a [[Truegold]] capable of challenging Underlords, Kiro eventually saw his armor fall apart and lost his shield while his left arm went numb.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Prince Seishen Kiro]] is a prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is the first prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen]] Kiro is the son of [[King Dakata]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro and Meira were looking for the [[Blackflame]] boy.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Prince Kiro has combat techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] glows with a silver-and-yellow corona.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro's [[sword]] has blue sparks on the blade.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro has a shield.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's shield]] is red-hot.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] is made entirely of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro's [[Path]] has aspects of earth and force.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is a prince.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro has a noble bloodline.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro may reach Overlord someday.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is an opponent [[Lindon]] may have to fight again before reaching [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is a star [[Underlord]] of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's shield]] is a heavy metal disc with a lion's face on it.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Prince Kiro is the son of [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen]] Kiro uses a shield with a lion on it.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is focused on Kiro.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is a [[Truegold]] who can stand up to Underlords.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is a person [[Seishen Daji]] might have joined.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] is falling apart.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro has lost his shield and his left arm is numb.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro launched a bright blue lance at [[Lindon]]'s back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro is an ally of Daji and Meira.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Kiro used a [[Striker technique]] in his [[sword]] that produced blue lightning.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen]] Kiro is associated with an urn.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The world stops against [[Seishen]] Kiro.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Prince Kiro saw Harmony in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Prince Kiro was left dead in [[Charity]]�s treasure [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Kiro is the brother of Daji.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Kiro is dead.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Kiro was the original crown prince.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Kiro is Daji's older brother.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Daji was resentful of Prince Kiro.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Prince Kiro is the first prince of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|It was too far away for Lindon to read, but he suspected it read “Seishen Kiro.” Not a jar, then. An urn.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
